audit_items.proof_trace: Blobs from EL are wrapped with KzgVerifiedBlob::from_execution_verified() which skips KZG proof verification entirely. Same issue in v2 path where blobs_to_data_column_sidecars uses EL-provided proofs without validation before propagation.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious or compromised EL sends invalid blob-commitment pairs. CL accepts them without verification, propagates to network, causing consensus splits when honest nodes reject invalid blobs.
